2606.29809.title: How Far Can You Get Without a GPU? A Systematic Benchmark of Lightweight Hallucination Detection Across Question Answering, Dialogue, and Summarisation
2606.29809.paper_summary: Hallucination detection has become a pressing requirement for trustworthy AI deployment at scale. The most accurate detection methods depend on GPU-intensive inference, proprietary API calls, or white-box access to the generating model. This puts them out of reach for resource-constrained researchers and practitioners. In this paper, we explore a practical alternative: how well can hallucination detection perform using only lightweight, CPU-feasible methods built on publicly available models? We systematically benchmark five such methods: ROUGE-L, semantic similarity, BERTScore, a Natural Language Inference (NLI) detector based on a FEVER-trained DeBERTa model, and a score-level ensemble of similarity and NLI. We evaluate them across all three tasks of the HaluEval benchmark: question answering (QA), dialogue, and summarisation. We calibrate each method on a held-out validation split and evaluate it on 2,000 test instances per task. We find that no single method dominates and performance is highly task-dependent. The ensemble performs best on QA (F1 = 0.792, AUC-ROC = 0.873), the NLI detector leads on dialogue (AUC-ROC = 0.713), and all five methods degrade to near-random performance on summarisation (AUC-ROC between 0.469 and 0.574). This task-dependence and the systematic failure on summarisation map the practical frontier of GPU-free hallucination detection. They give practical guidance for method selection under computational constraints. All experiments run on a standard laptop CPU using public models.
2606.29809.paper_summary_zh: 幻覺檢測已成為在大規模可信 AI 部署中的一項迫切需求。最準確的檢測方法依賴於 GPU 密集型推理、專有 API 調用或對生成模型的白盒訪問。這使得資源有限的研究人員和從業者無法使用這些方法。在本文中，我們探索了一種實用的替代方案：僅使用基於公開可用模型的輕量級、可在 CPU 上運行的方法，幻覺檢測的效果如何？我們系統性地基準測試了五種這樣的方法：ROUGE-L、語義相似度、BERTScore、一個基於 FEVER 訓練的 DeBERTa 模型的自然語言推理 (NLI) 檢測器，以及相似度和 NLI 的得分級集成。我們在 HaluEval 基準的三個任務上對它們進行評估：問題回答 (QA)、對話和摘要。我們在保留的驗證集上對每種方法進行校準，並在每個任務上評估 2,000 個測試實例。我們發現沒有單一方法佔據主導地位，性能高度依賴於任務。集成在 QA 上表現最佳 (F1 = 0.792, AUC-ROC = 0.873)，NLI 檢測器在對話上領先 (AUC-ROC = 0.713)，而所有五種方法在摘要上表現接近隨機 (AUC-ROC 在 0.469 和 0.574 之間)。這種任務依賴性和在摘要上的系統性失敗描繪了無 GPU 幻覺檢測的實際邊界。它們為在計算約束下的方法選擇提供了實用指導。所有實驗均在使用公共模型的標準筆記本電腦 CPU 上運行。
2606.29809.author: Kriti Faujdar et.al.
